title: YTP: The Blibble (Part 2)
description:
In this video, God withdraws from the election for being too old.

RedeemedZoomer's "story of the entire Bible, i guess" which can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B5wCziuqnwk&t=34s, is once again the source and as we move out of Genesis into Exodus, we find things have gotten spicier than a Mountain Dew/Flaming Hot Cheetohs rivalry.

If you loved this, subscribe for more and if you want to support me on Patreon, do so here:
https://www.patreon.com/Captpan6

And you can also follow me on my socials for all sorts of other cool stuff!
https://twitter.com/captpan6
